keyword.name: active
keyword.label: refinement metric computed from active statistics

keyword.name: initial_size
keyword.label: Trust region initial size (relative to bounds)

keyword.name: contract_threshold
keyword.label: Shrink trust region if trust region ratio is below this value

keyword.name: expand_threshold
keyword.label: Expand trust region if trust region ratio is above this value

keyword.name: increment_start_rank
keyword.label: refinement by increment in start rank

keyword.name: increment_start_order
keyword.label: refinement by increment in start order

keyword.name: increment_max_rank
keyword.label: refinement by increment in max rank

keyword.name: increment_max_order
keyword.label: refinement by increment in max order

keyword.name: increment_max_rank_order
keyword.label: refinement by increment in max rank and max order

keyword.name: nested
keyword.label: nested
keyword.default: quadrature: non_nested unless automated refinement; sparse grids: nested

keyword.name: noise_tolerance
keyword.label: noise_tolerance
keyword.default: 1e-3 for BPDN, 0. otherwise (algorithms run until termination)

keyword.name: noise_tolerance
keyword.label: noise_tolerance
keyword.default: 1e-3 for BPDN, 0. otherwise (algorithms run until termination)

keyword.name: noise_tolerance
keyword.label: noise_tolerance
keyword.default: 1e-3 for BPDN, 0. otherwise (algorithms run until termination)

keyword.name: noise_tolerance
keyword.label: noise_tolerance
keyword.default: 1e-3 for BPDN, 0. otherwise (algorithms run until termination)

keyword.name: max_cv_order_candidates
keyword.label: Maximum number of cross-validation candidates for adapting basis order

keyword.name: response_scaling
keyword.label: Scale response data prior to build

keyword.name: tensor_grid
keyword.label: tensor_grid
keyword.default: regression with LHS sample set (point collocation)

keyword.name: reuse_points
keyword.label: reuse_points
keyword.default: no sample reuse in coefficient estimation

keyword.name: independent
keyword.label: Use independent pilot samples per group

keyword.name: collocation_ratio
keyword.label: Collocation point oversampling ratio to estimate coeffs

keyword.name: reuse_points
keyword.label: reuse_points
keyword.default: no sample reuse in coefficient estimation

keyword.name: reuse_points
keyword.label: reuse_points
keyword.default: no sample reuse in coefficient estimation

keyword.name: tensor_grid
keyword.label: tensor_grid
keyword.default: regression with LHS sample set (point collocation)

keyword.name: reuse_points
keyword.label: reuse_points
keyword.default: no sample reuse in coefficient estimation

keyword.name: collocation_points_sequence
keyword.label: Number of collocation points per model instance

keyword.name: tensor_grid
keyword.label: tensor_grid
keyword.default: regression with LHS sample set (point collocation)

keyword.name: reuse_points
keyword.label: reuse_points
keyword.default: no sample reuse in coefficient estimation

keyword.name: diagonal_covariance
keyword.label: diagonal_covariance
keyword.default: diagonal_covariance for response vector > 10; else full_covariance

keyword.name: interaction_order
keyword.label: Restriction of order of VBD interations
keyword.default: Unrestricted (VBD includes all interaction orders present in the expansion)

keyword.name: drop_tolerance
keyword.label: VBD tolerance for omitting small indices

keyword.name: vbd_sampling_method
keyword.label: Sampling method for computing Sobol indices

keyword.name: num_bins
keyword.label: Number of bins for the binned sampling method for computing Sobol indices

keyword.name: import_approx_points_file
keyword.label: File name for importing samples for evaluating the PCE
keyword.default: no point import from a file

keyword.name: export_approx_points_file
keyword.label: File name for exporting approximation-based samples from evaluating the PCE
keyword.default: no point export to a file

keyword.name: normalized
keyword.label: Output PCE coefficients corresponding to normalized basis
keyword.default: PCE coefficients correspond to unnormalized basis polynomials

keyword.name: export_expansion_file
keyword.label: File name for exporting the coefficients and multi-index of a PCE

keyword.name: max_cross_iterations
keyword.label: Maximum number of cross approximation iterations

keyword.name: response_scaling
keyword.label: Scale response data prior to build

keyword.name: collocation_ratio
keyword.label: Collocation point oversampling ratio to estimate coeffs

keyword.name: collocation_points
keyword.label: Number collocation points to estimate coeffs

keyword.name: collocation_ratio
keyword.label: Collocation point oversampling ratio to estimate coeffs

keyword.name: kick_order
keyword.label: Increment when adapting polynomial basis order

keyword.name: max_cv_order_candidates
keyword.label: Maximum number of cross-validation candidates for adapting basis order

keyword.name: max_rank
keyword.label: Maximum rank of the function train

keyword.name: max_cv_rank_candidates
keyword.label: Maximum number of cross-validation candidates for adapting rank

keyword.name: increment_start_rank
keyword.label: refinement by increment in start rank

keyword.name: increment_start_order
keyword.label: refinement by increment in start order

keyword.name: increment_max_rank
keyword.label: refinement by increment in max rank

keyword.name: increment_max_order
keyword.label: refinement by increment in max order

keyword.name: increment_max_rank_order
keyword.label: refinement by increment in max rank and max order

keyword.name: max_cross_iterations
keyword.label: Maximum number of cross approximation iterations

keyword.name: response_scaling
keyword.label: Scale response data prior to build

keyword.name: collocation_points
keyword.label: Number collocation points to estimate coeffs

keyword.name: collocation_ratio
keyword.label: Collocation point oversampling ratio to estimate coeffs

keyword.name: adapt_order
keyword.label: Adapt polynomial basis order using cross validation

keyword.name: kick_order
keyword.label: Increment when adapting polynomial basis order

keyword.name: max_cv_order_candidates
keyword.label: Maximum number of cross-validation candidates for adapting basis order

keyword.name: adapt_rank
keyword.label: Flag for whether or not to adapt the rank

keyword.name: max_rank
keyword.label: Maximum rank of the function train

keyword.name: max_cv_rank_candidates
keyword.label: Maximum number of cross-validation candidates for adapting rank

keyword.name: num_probability_levels
keyword.label: num_probability_levels
keyword.default: probability_levels evenly distributed among response functions

keyword.name: num_gen_reliability_levels
keyword.label: num_gen_reliability_levels
keyword.default: gen_reliability_levels evenly distributed among response functions

keyword.name: num_reliability_levels
keyword.label: num_reliability_levels
keyword.default: reliability_levels evenly distributed among response functions

keyword.name: num_response_levels
keyword.label: num_response_levels
keyword.default: response_levels evenly distributed among response functions

keyword.name: num_response_levels
keyword.label: num_response_levels
keyword.default: response_levels evenly distributed among response functions

keyword.name: cools_kuo_nuyens
keyword.label: Generating vector from Cools, Kuo and Nuyens (2016)

keyword.name: joe_kuo
keyword.label: Generating matrices from Joe and Kuo (2008)

keyword.name: variables_pointer
keyword.label: Variables Pointer
keyword.default: model use of last variables parsed

keyword.name: responses_pointer
keyword.label: Responses Pointer
keyword.default: model use of last responses parsed
N/A ( single if no model specification)
keyword.label: Single
keyword.name: single

keyword.default: Infer from response or method specification
keyword.label: Active variables
keyword.name: active

keyword.default: relaxed (branch and bound), mixed (all other methods)
keyword.label: mixed
keyword.name: mixed

keyword.default: no discrete design set integer variables
keyword.label: integer
keyword.name: integer

keyword.default: middle set value, or rounded down
keyword.label: Initial point
keyword.name: initial_point

keyword.default: no discrete design set string variables
keyword.label: string
keyword.name: string

keyword.default: middle set value, or rounded down
keyword.label: Initial point
keyword.name: initial_point

keyword.default: no discrete design set real variables
keyword.label: real
keyword.name: real

keyword.default: middle set value, or rounded down
keyword.label: initial_point
keyword.name: initial_point

keyword.label: key to apportionment among bin-based histogram variables
keyword.name: pairs_per_variable

keyword.label: sets of abscissas for bin-based histogram variables
keyword.name: abscissas

keyword.label: sets of ordinates for bin-based histogram variables
keyword.name: ordinates

keyword.label: sets of counts for bin-based histogram variables
keyword.name: counts

keyword.label: sets of abscissas for point-based histogram variables
keyword.name: abscissas

keyword.label: sets of counts for point-based histogram variables
keyword.name: counts

keyword.default: Equal apportionment of intervals among variables
keyword.label: number of intervals defined for each continuous interval variable
keyword.name: num_intervals

keyword.default: Equal probability assignments for each interval (1/num_intervals[i])
keyword.label: basic probability assignments per continuous interval
keyword.name: interval_probabilities

keyword.default: Equal apportionment of intervals among variables
keyword.label: Number of intervals defined for each interval variable
keyword.name: num_intervals

keyword.default: Equal probability assignments for each interval (1/num_intervals[i])
keyword.label: Basic probability assignments per interval
keyword.name: interval_probabilities

keyword.default: no discrete uncertain set integer variables
keyword.label: integer
keyword.name: integer

keyword.default: Equal probability assignments for each set member (1/num_set_values[i])
keyword.label: Probabilities for each set member
keyword.name: set_probabilities

keyword.default: no discrete uncertain set string variables
keyword.label: string
keyword.name: string

keyword.default: Equal probability assignments for each set member (1/num_set_values[i])
keyword.label: Probabilities for each set member
keyword.name: set_probabilities

keyword.default: no discrete uncertain set real variables
keyword.label: real
keyword.name: real

keyword.default: Equal probability assignments for each set member (1/num_set_values[i])
keyword.label: set_probabilities
keyword.name: set_probabilities

keyword.default: no discrete state set integer variables
keyword.label: integer
keyword.name: integer

keyword.default: middle set value, or rounded down
keyword.label: Initial state
keyword.name: initial_state

keyword.default: no discrete state set string variables

keyword.label: Initial state

keyword.default: no discrete state set real variables

keyword.default: middle set value, or rounded down
keyword.label: initial_state
keyword.name: initial_state

keyword.default: results files removed before each evaluation
keyword.label: Allow Existing Results
keyword.name: allow_existing_results

keyword.default: driver/filter invocation syntax augmented with file names
keyword.label: Verbatim
keyword.name: verbatim

keyword.default: results files removed before each evaluation
keyword.label: Allow Existing Results
keyword.name: allow_existing_results

keyword.default: driver/filter invocation syntax augmented with file names
keyword.label: Verbatim
keyword.name: verbatim

keyword.label: Number of Processors per Analysis Server
keyword.name: processors_per_analysis

keyword.label: Additional Identifiers for Use by the Analysis Drivers
keyword.name: analysis_components

keyword.default: Active set vector control, function evaluation cache, and restart file features are active
keyword.label: Feature Deactivation
keyword.name: deactivate

keyword.default: local: unlimited batch size, hybrid: zero batch size
keyword.label: Batch size
keyword.name: size

keyword.default: local: unlimited concurrency, hybrid: no concurrency
keyword.label: Asynchronous Evaluation Concurrency
keyword.name: evaluation_concurrency

keyword.default: local: unlimited concurrency, hybrid: no concurrency
keyword.label: Asynchronous Analysis Concurrency
keyword.name: analysis_concurrency

keyword.label: Message Passing Configuration for Scheduling of Evaluations
keyword.name: evaluation_scheduling

keyword.label: Number of Processors per Evaluation Server
keyword.name: processors_per_evaluation

keyword.label: Message Passing Configuration for Scheduling of Analyses
keyword.name: analysis_scheduling
